body.zh-TW: 節點與 Edge 各自記錄走訪數據。節點記錄：traversal_count（總走訪次數）、unique_traverser_count（不重複訪客數）。Edge 記錄：traversal_count、rating_avg（1–5 平均評分，無評分時為 null）、rating_count。走訪透過 API 的 POST /nodes/{id}/traverse 或 POST /edges/{id}/traverse 記錄。MCP tool traverse_edge 也會觸發計數。這些數字反映知識的實際使用頻率，不只是被記錄的事實。
body.en: Nodes and edges each track traversal data. Nodes record: traversal_count (total visits) and unique_traverser_count (distinct actors). Edges record: traversal_count, rating_avg (1–5 average, null if no ratings), and rating_count. Traversals are recorded via POST /nodes/{id}/traverse or POST /edges/{id}/traverse in the REST API, or via the MCP tool traverse_edge. These numbers reflect actual knowledge usage frequency, not just what was recorded.
